results.title: TG20 provides a platform for young players to showcase their talent, says Aces’ CV Milind
results.description: Anticipation is building ahead of the inaugural edition of the Hyderabad Cricket Association’s TG20, with all eight franchise captains coming together for a pre-season press conference on the eve of the tournament’s opening match at the Rajiv Gandhi International Stadium, Uppal, on Saturday evening. Representing their respective franchises were Tanay Thyagarajan (Ranga Reddy Risers), Ravi [...]

results.title: Iran closes Strait of Hormuz again, cites MoU violation by US and Israel
results.description: Iran announced the closure of the Strait of Hormuz again, alleging that the US and Israel violated the first clause of a recently signed MoU aimed at ending military operations. The move was triggered by continued ceasefire violations in Lebanon and a breach of commitments under the June 18 US-Iran agreement

results.title: Word of the day: Porcine
results.description: Animals have long influenced the English language, providing a rich source of words used to describe appearance, behaviour and physical characteristic.

results.title: CM Vijay greets President Murmu on birthday
results.description: DMK president and former Chief Minister MK Stalin also greeted President Murmu on her birthday
